about.label: About
about.heading: Therapy that begins in the body
about.body: I'm a master's-level social worker and student psychotherapist. My work is rooted in the belief that the body holds stories the mind hasn't yet learned to tell. By weaving together somatic work, trauma processing, and breathwork, I create a space where real change becomes possible.
about.quote: The only journey is the one within.

items.title: Somatic Work
items.description: A body-oriented approach that addresses patterns held in the nervous system.

items.title: Trauma Processing
items.description: Safe, gradual work with experiences that have left their mark on body and mind.

items.title: Breathwork & Mindfulness
items.description: Regulation techniques that build the foundation for inner equilibrium.

items.title: LGBTQ+ Affirmative Therapy
items.description: A space for all identities — free of judgment, held with deep understanding.

qualifications.label: Background & Approach
qualifications.heading: What I bring to the room

pricing.label: Pricing
pricing.heading: Transparent pricing
pricing.note: Sessions take place in Mengeš and Črnuče (Ljubljana). Online sessions are also available.

booking.label: Book
booking.heading: Book a session
booking.subheading: Choose a time that works for you. Confirmation arrives immediately.
